text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity here. The quietness of the modern meeting space hints at limitless potential—ideas waiting to be born or shared. In the room with "R+D" boldly on the wall, I am surrounded by the spirit of inventive progress, a celebration of human creativity and the pursuit of knowledge. The environment invites contemplation, and I feel a spark of excitement, ready to observe the unfolding of new thoughts and innovations.
